brand_profile.writing_instruction: Short sentences. Lead with the key benefit. Assume a business reader — focus on outcomes. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader scans — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: innovative, cutting-edge, game-changer.

brand_identity.writing_instruction: Short sentences. Lead with the key benefit. Assume a business reader — focus on outcomes. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader scans — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: innovative, cutting-edge, game-changer.

product_knowledge.description: CleverTap is an all-in-one customer engagement platform that helps businesses create personalized experiences to retain their most valuable customers. It provides a suite of tools for customer data and analytics, experimentation and optimization, personalization, and campaign orchestration.

features.name: Push Notifications
features.description: Send targeted push notifications to customers

features.name: Email Automation
features.description: Automate email campaigns for customer engagement

features.name: In-App Messages
features.description: Send in-app messages for personalized customer experiences

features.name: Web Messaging
features.description: Engage with customers on the web

benefits: Boost in Retention with Advanced User Insights
Uplift in CTRs of push notifications

proof_points.text: 5x Boost in Retention with Advanced User Insights
40% Uplift in CTRs of push notifications
CleverTap is a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Personalization Engines

product_knowledge.target_customer: Businesses looking to create personalized customer experiences and improve customer retention

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: Customer success platforms like CleverTap often utilize carousels to educate on features and benefits, e.g., showcasing how personalized experiences improve customer retention.
content_brief.reasoning: The product CleverTap has 6 distinct features and addresses 3 significant pain points in customer success, making a carousel suitable for educational and step-by-step content. The corporate brand tone and the presence of 5 proof points support a detailed, informative approach. Although there is a strong stat, the multiple features and pain points take precedence for a carousel format.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Difficulty in retaining valuable customers due to lack of personalized experiences and understanding of customer behavior
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Create personalized experiences to retain your most valuable customers with CleverTap's all-in-one customer engagement platform
strategy_brief.proof_point: 5x Boost in Retention with Advanced User Insights
strategy_brief.differentiator: Unlike traditional engagement platforms, CleverTap provides a suite of tools for customer data analysis and personalized experiences
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Discover how to boost customer retention with personalized experiences

linkedin_content.hook: Boost customer retention with personalized experiences.
linkedin_content.body:
Valuable customers slip away when experiences are generic.

Customers crave relevance. Without it, they leave. Lack of insight into customer behavior makes it hard to personalize.

This leads to a frustrating cycle: Customers abandon ship, teams scratch their heads.

CleverTap's customer engagement platform helps. It lets you create personalized experiences.

With advanced user insights, you understand your customers. Their needs, preferences, and pain points.

The result? 5x boost in retention. Proven. No buzzwords.

Learn how to turn customer data into loyalty. Discover CleverTap's all-in-one platform.

Learn more.
linkedin_content.full_post:
Boost customer retention with personalized experiences.

Valuable customers slip away when experiences are generic.

Customers crave relevance. Without it, they leave. Lack of insight into customer behavior makes it hard to personalize.

This leads to a frustrating cycle: Customers abandon ship, teams scratch their heads.

CleverTap's customer engagement platform helps. It lets you create personalized experiences.

With advanced user insights, you understand your customers. Their needs, preferences, and pain points.

The result? 5x boost in retention. Proven. No buzzwords.

Learn how to turn customer data into loyalty. Discover CleverTap's all-in-one platform.

Learn more.

#CustomerRetention #Personalization #CustomerEngagement

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is clear overall, but one minor section slows reading. The main message is straightforward: CleverTap's platform helps create personalized experiences to boost customer retention. However, the sentence 'Lack of insight into customer behavior makes it hard to personalize' could be more concise. The hook 'Boost customer retention with personalized experiences' establishes context but creates no urgency or curiosity. It is a straightforward statement of the benefit, but does not grab the reader's attention with a surprising fact or specific daily friction. The copy mostly follows the writing instruction. It uses short sentences, leads with the key benefit, and avoids jargon and superlatives. However, the phrase 'Proven. No buzzwords' feels slightly off, as it could be seen as a minor deviation from the tone. Every claim is directly traceable to the primary_claim. The copy mentions '5x boost in retention' which is verbatim from the proof_point.
